title: About Firewall Instances
description: Ananta supports the delivery and management of Virtual Firewall Instances (VFI) in an as-a-service model. VFI is essentially a Linux Instance pre-loaded with a firewall software which makes it work as a a virtual appliance. The Service falls under the Virtual Firewall and is built using our integration framework using pfSense or FortiGate VM for powering the appliance.
